nasb.text: Then on the eighth day she shall take for herself two turtledoves or two young pigeons and bring them in to the priest, to the doorway of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: And on the eighth day she shall take two turtledoves or two pigeons and bring them to the priest, to the entrance of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 第八天，她要拿兩隻斑鳩或兩隻雛鴿，帶到會幕門口，交給祭司。

ccb.text: 第八天，她要把两只斑鸠或雏鸽带到会幕门口，交给祭司献祭，
